name: [fornecer: nome da marca (brand_config.identity.BRAND_NAME)] -- Sourcing Opportunity Matrix
description: Cross supplier cost (the offer side, parsed from your supplier catalogs) against market price and demand per product type, rank by margin with a skeptical re-check of the top-N, and emit a go/no-go sourcing verdict.

examples: Find the best products to source from <supplier catalog> -- cost vs market margin
